/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libboost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.so -o libboost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.so CMakeFiles/boost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.dir/printer/console_printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.dir/printer/hello_world_printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.dir/shape/square.cpp.o CMakeFiles/boost_plugin_loader_example_plugin_impl.dir/shape/triangle.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tetripick/UR10_Pick_ws/ros2_ws/build/boost_plugin_loader/examples:/home/tetripick/UR10_Pick_ws/ros2_ws/build/boost_plugin_loader: libboost_plugin_loader_example_plugin.so ../libboost_plugin_loader.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 -ldl
